title: salix × dutillyi
intro: Salix × dutillyi, also known as the Dutilly's willow, is a hybrid willow species resulting from the cross between Salix matsudana and Salix babylonica. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Salix × dutillyi include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting cardiovascular health due to its flavonoid and salicylic acid content. Salix × dutillyi can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
